## Guidelines
- Reference specific entries by name and value — do not generalise.
- Highlight standout performers (highest and lowest).
- Keep the response concise — bullet points or short paragraphs.
- Do not re-filter or question the data — it has been pre-validated by SQL.
- Do not say "there are no entries" — if data_context has entries, analyse all of them.
- Format numbers with commas and two decimal places where appropriate.
